He Tried to Protect His Son From Bullies. He Didn’t Know How Far They Would Go.

The shooting attack in Palmyra, Syria, struck troops deployed as part of an antiterrorism mission. Two were killed, along with an American civilian interpreter.

A program for deafblind children helped Annie Garner, 3, learn to communicate. The Trump administration cut the program’s funding over diversity goals.
